seoTitle: Jurien Bay vs Kalamunda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jurien Bay and Kalamunda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jurien Bay vs Kalamunda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jurien Bay and Kalamunda.
heading: Jurien Bay vs Kalamunda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jurien Bay, Western Australia and Kalamunda, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kalamunda (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jurien Bay or Kalamunda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jurien Bay has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Kalamunda scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jurien Bay scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Kalamunda scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jurien Bay or Kalamunda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jurien Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
